'''bathacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:praeludium|praeludium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-th-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:praeludium|praeludium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bathacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæthæchæth|bæthæchæth]] || [[word:bæthæchæj|bæthæchæj]] || [[word:bæthæchæsh|bæthæchæsh]] || [[word:bæthæchæ|bæthæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bathathachath|bathathachath]] || [[word:bathathachaj|bathathachaj]] || [[word:bathathachash|bathathachash]] || [[word:bathathacha|bathathacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bathachath|bathachath]] || [[word:bathachaj|bathachaj]] || [[word:bathachash|bathachash]] || [[word:bathacha|bathacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bathafchath|bathafchath]] || [[word:bathafchaj|bathafchaj]] || [[word:bathafchash|bathafchash]] || [[word:bathafchaf|bathafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bathachatha|bathachatha]] || [[word:bathachaja|bathachaja]] || [[word:bathachasha|bathachasha]] || [[word:bathachaka|bathachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bathachath|bathachath]] || [[word:bathachaj|bathachaj]] || [[word:bathachash|bathachash]] || [[word:bathacha|bathacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bathachathal|bathachathal]] || [[word:bathachajal|bathachajal]] || [[word:bathachashal|bathachashal]] || [[word:bathachakal|bathachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bathachathatha|bathachathatha]] || [[word:bathachajaja|bathachajaja]] || [[word:bathachashasha|bathachashasha]] || [[word:bathachaka|bathachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bathachathan|bathachathan]] || [[word:bathachajan|bathachajan]] || [[word:bathachashan|bathachashan]] || [[word:bathachakan|bathachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bathachathaoro|bathachathaoro]] || [[word:bathachajaoro|bathachajaoro]] || [[word:bathachashaoro|bathachashaoro]] || [[word:bathachakaoro|bathachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
